node.text: Calvin recently toured with a well-known artist and had a show in Japan.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "Tokyo excitement avoid") on Session 14 (Score: 0.72)

node.text: Calvin met Frank Ocean at a music festival in Tokyo where they clicked and recorded a song together.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "Tokyo excitement avoid") on Session 15 (Score: 0.84)

node.text: Calvin will be in Japan for a few months before heading to Boston.
Calvin described Tokyo as buzzing with energy and the festival crowd as lively.

node.text: Calvin's agent found him an awesome place to stay in Japan.
